name: falling-into-grace
description: Adyashanti's 'Falling into Grace: Insights on the End of Suffering' — a clear, accessible guide to the fundamental insights of non-dual spirituality: why we suffer, how we become entranced by thought, and how grace reveals our true nature beyond the egoic mind.
useCase: Understanding the root cause of suffering (believing our thoughts), awakening from the egoic trance, learning to feel emotions without adding story, discovering inner stability, and opening to grace.
knownRisks: Non-dual teachings can feel abstract or paradoxical
Intellectual understanding is not the goal — direct experience is required
Some may find the deconstruction of thought unsettling
Adyashanti's approach is not for everyone — different paths suit different people
